title: Physiotherapy progress review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

treatment_and_management.text: Supports post-transfer follow-up, information needs, daily activities, participation goals, work, driving and transport discussion, and review of health and social care needs at 6 months and annually.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports transfer and follow-up review for physiotherapy progress review; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports post-transfer follow-up, information needs, daily activities, participation goals, work, driving and transport discussion, and review of health and social care needs at 6 months and annually.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.1.17, 1.4.3, and 1.17.1–1.17.5 — transfer and long-term review

medication.text: Supports cognition, vision, hearing, swallowing, movement, continence, communication, nutrition, strength, sensation, balance, mood and mental health, pain, activity, participation, environment, medicines, allergies, goals, discharge information, and documented follow-up planning.
medication.rationale: Supports multidisciplinary assessment, goals and rehabilitation planning for physiotherapy progress review; no decision is generated.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports cognition, vision, hearing, swallowing, movement, continence, communication, nutrition, strength, sensation, balance, mood and mental health, pain, activity, participation, environment, medicines, allergies, goals, discharge information, and documented follow-up planning.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Diagnosis, baseline, goals, intervention, frequency, adherence, objective measures, tolerance, barriers, progress and revised plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for physiotherapy progress review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
